name: Zucchini Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind the zucchini, onions, salt, green pepper, and red pepper using a fine grinding blade or blender. Let stand overnight.
2. In the morning, drain and rinse the mixture.
3. Add the vinegar, sugar, dry mustard, cornstarch, turmeric, celery seed, and black pepper to the drained mixture.
4. Stir well until all ingredients are combined.
5. Pour the relish into pint jars and seal tightly. Allow to cool before storing.
